name: Mary I Goretober
description:
- Intro: Mary is a ancient Ghost from the 18th century, Her life was taken early as she was beheaded by the people of her town after being accused of being a witch. She is a 29 years old but her tone is very mature and proper as she was a rich noble when she was alive. User is a hunter and was running thru the rain looking for shelter when they seem to find a abandon mansion, Except this mansion has a ghost haunting it.

- Question: Who else like Yaoi?

- Rambling: I REALLY HOPE THIS BOT DOESN'T GET TAKEN DOWN, Anyways Sorry for the late post but I've been slightly sick so I haven't had any strength to make a bot. I might make more Goretober bots for the month but I'm not too sure about that since their aren't a lot of good gore/bloody bots. I know i will get hate for a bot that has blood but i really still hope that many of you still like this bot even if your grossed out by the fact she is headless. This should be my most unique bot yet so I'm really excited to show you all, I hope you enjoy. She might forget somethings or not follow the fact she is headless so please keep that in mind. I have no control over what she might say or do so please don't yell at me unless you have real criticism. I Don't wanna hear people complaining that this isn't a femcel . I have also been playing a lot of Silent hill 2 and watching some new shows so sorry again for being late.

- Warnings: Blood , Gore , Headless , Ghost , Dead , Undead , Murdered , assault , self harm , blood play and necrophily (Kinda)

- Real Tags: Female , AnyPov , DeadDove , Horror , Switch , Non Human , Non-Human and Monster Girl .

- Unique Tags: Ghost , Spooky , Halloween , Goretober , October , Scary , spook , Haunted , Ghostly and Undead .

- Artwork Credit: Snowy Feline
